macro.title: Nasdaq drops for a second day as tech pullback picks up steam, Micron shares slide 7%: Live updates - CNBC
macro.summary: Declines in technology led the losses as traders monitored oil prices and bond yields while awaiting further developments with the conflict in the Middle East.

macro.title: LIRR riders experiencing hours-long commutes to NYC as train strike enters its third day - CBS News
macro.summary: LIRR commuters are taking shuttle buses and subways into New York City as the largest commuter rail system in North America remains shut down.

macro.title: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman - BBC
macro.summary: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".

macro.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it - CNBC
macro.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."

macro.title: The oil market is reaching a ‘tipping point’ that could create problems for stocks, according to this Wall Street legend - MarketWatch
